$description: Maps brand accent words (as written in a brief's brand.accent) to a primitive color ramp. The planner uses this to choose a theme deterministically — an accent word never invents a color, it selects a vetted ramp. Longer keys are matched before shorter ones.
notes: If the accent word maps to a ramp that has no brand theme yet, generate one with `impression theme <name> --accent <ramp>` (or --hex for a custom color).
brand.accent is a description, never a hex — the system composes from vetted ramps.
